title: microlicia agrestis
intro: Microlicia agrestis, also known as the Wild Microlicia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. It is native to tropical regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Microlicia agrestis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems, among other uses. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
